payload.text:
Available commands:
/start — Start the bot
/help — Show this help message
/booking — View booking details by reference code
/calendar — Pick a reservation date
/slots — Browse available time slots
/today — Show today's bookings and remaining capacity
/upcoming — Show upcoming bookings for the next days
/book — Make a reservation
/reschedule — Reschedule an existing booking
/cancel — Cancel the current operation
/mark_noshow — Mark a booking as no-show (admin only)

name: unknown /command replies with a friendly fallback

payload.text: I don't know that command. Send /help to see what I can do.
